series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on employees containing all records associated with discipline. Records may include investigatory interviews; supporting materials; procedural documents; exhibits; notes; correspondence; Probationary Removal/Reduction Checklist; Direct Order; Copy of Notice of Disciplinary Actions; Pre-discipline Report; administrative investigation packets; incident packets; and, any other document relating to review and issuance of employee discipline.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Discipline is removed from this file in accordance with policy and statutory guidelines. Upon termination of employment, what is contained in the file at that time will be merged with the Personnel File and maintained according to the corresponding active schedule for Personnel Files. ; Electronic: Discipline is removed from this file in accordance with policy and statutory guidelines. Upon termination of employment, what is contained in the file at that time will be merged with the Personnel File and maintained according to the corresponding active schedule for Personnel Files., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
